---
title: Intersectionality of sex and ethnicity on primary care management of symptoms associated with colorectal cancer
author:
  - name: Deepthi Lavu
    orcid: 0000-0002-5922-9366
    affiliations: University of Exeter
  - name: Sarah Price
    orcid: 0000-0002-2228-2374
    affiliations: University of Exeter
  - name: Gary Abel
    orcid: 0000-0003-2231-5161
    affiliations: University of Exeter
  - name: Bianca Weiring
    orcid: 0000-0001-6708-5705
    affiliations: University of Exeter
  - name: Yin Zhou
    orcid: 0000-0002-8815-1457
    affiliations: Queen Mary University London
  - name: Richard Neal
    orcid: 0000-0002-3544-2744
    affiliations: University of Exeter

date: 06-01-2026
---

This website will be updated during the course of this PhD
